key.name: pause-on-suspend
key.description: Stop counting the focused window while the system is suspended or the lid is closed.

key.name: pause-on-lock
key.description: Stop counting the focused window while the screen is locked.

key.name: prune-days
key.description: Events older than this are deleted on startup.

key.name: panel-refresh-secs
key.description: How often the panel total is recomputed.
